name: Cosmouth Archives and Treasury
summary: Combined archival and treasury complex preserving records, taxes, and maritime account legitimacy.
day_to_day: Maintains ledgers, stores taxes, certifies records, and handles maritime-facing fiscal paperwork.
who_works_there: Archivists, tax clerks, treasury officers, seal keepers, maritime auditors.
who_uses_it: House Cosmouth officers, captains, merchants, scholars, and other houses needing record services.
authority: Can authenticate records, secure treasuries, and shape maritime fiscal legitimacy.
public_manifestation: Queues of document carriers, sealed vaults, stamped manifests, and guarded counting rooms.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Records become political weapons when tax, debt, or cargo loss disputes escalate.
